full_lgbm.notes: Multi-seed averaging with seeds=[42, 0, 1] on same 5 folds; test preds averaged over 15 models (3 seeds x 5 folds); OOF/CV from seed=42 only.

full_catboost.notes: CatBoost with native categorical handling (no LabelEncoder), depth=6, lr=0.05, early_stopping=50. Matches lgbm closely — good ensemble candidate.

observation: Full_xgb scores 0.8123±0.0059, slightly below full_catboost (0.8131) and full_lgbm (0.8130). All three variants now trained and ready for ensemble. Recommend ensembling full_lgbm + full_catboost + full_xgb.
